remaining_tasks.name: Fix CR-01: INNER JOIN → LEFT JOIN in checklist.sql final SELECT
GAP-03: confirm CloudFront checklist key after next nightly run

blockers.description: CR-01 (BLOCKER): checklist.sql final SELECT uses INNER JOIN to final_eco CTE — silently drops rows for any county whose name doesn't exactly match stg_geo__us_counties. Must change to LEFT JOIN.
blockers.workaround: Current WA county names all match so no data lost in practice, but fragile.

human_actions_pending.action: After next nightly run: confirm manifest.json has 'checklist' key and hashed URL returns HTTP 200

decisions.decision: Use LEFT JOIN (not INNER) in checklist.sql final_eco join
decisions.rationale: INNER JOIN silently drops county rows on name mismatch; LEFT JOIN preserves all rows and assigns NULL ecoregion for unmatched counties

next_action: Fix CR-01: in data/dbt/models/marts/checklist.sql, find the final SELECT and change 'INNER JOIN final_eco fe ON fe.county = wl.county' to 'LEFT JOIN final_eco fe ON fe.county = wl.county'. Then run: cd data && bash dbt/run.sh build && uv run pytest -k checklist -v. Then commit and re-run /gsd-verify-work 111.
context_notes: Phase 111 fully executed. All 4 tasks committed across 2 waves. Verification: human_needed (11/12). UAT: GAP-01 (dbt build + pytest) and GAP-02 (copy to public/data) confirmed by human this session. GAP-03 needs nightly run. Code review found CR-01 (INNER JOIN bug in checklist.sql) — fix is one-line change before phase can be marked complete. WR-01 (test_no_production_dbt_references always fails) also needs deletion.
